description: CompositionGrey jersey made of 100% recycled polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a round neck, short raglan sleeves, stitch detailing and printed nike swoosh on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsCrafted from soft polyester and engineered with Dri-Fit technology, this jersey from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great choice to wear on a healthy run or on casual days. Team this tee with track pants or shorts and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during the winter.
